name: Y/n
long_description:
Y/n is the most entertaining app in the world.

On Y/n, you play a character in a story. Be a boarding school transfer student and get the boys to fall in love with you, or figure out a jailbreak with Sherlock Holmes.

Your choices change the story and how characters feel about you (oops!) – so no two playthroughs are the same (but you can rewind).

■ Play interactive romance, drama, fanfiction, mysteries, fantasy, fluff (or angst), and more.
■ Discover 1M+ stories written by the community. 
■ Write and publish your own interactive stories.

Download Y/n and try for yourself!
